name: Chicken a La King
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces mushroom, thinly sliced and sauteed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Bake biscuits according to package directions.
3. In a large skillet, melt butter.
4. Add bell pepper and celery; cook and stir for 1 minute.
5. Stir in flour, bouillon, and thyme until mixture is smooth and bubbly.
6. Gradually add milk, cooking over medium-high heat until the mixture boils and thickens, stirring constantly.
7. Stir in chicken, peas, mushrooms, and pimientos; heat thoroughly.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve by splitting biscuits and placing 2 halves on each plate.
10. Top with sauce.
